Meatgrinder.summary: Purge the Foe mirror match — kill units and dominate objectives.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more enemy units were destroyed this turn. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: More enemy units than friendly units were destroyed since the end of your opponent's last turn. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers in your opponent's deployment zone. REWARD: 5 VP.

Meatgrinder.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Unstoppable Force.summary: Purge vs Take and Hold — kill every turn and seize ground.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more enemy units were destroyed this turn. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that you did not control at the start of your turn. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control one or more Centre objective markers. REWARD: 5 VP.

Unstoppable Force.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Punishment.summary: Purge vs Disruption — condemn enemy units and hold objectives.

blocks.label: SETUP
blocks.text: At the start of each of your turns, select 1–3 Condemned enemy units: units that destroyed a friendly unit on the previous turn and/or are within range of an objective marker you do not control.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more Condemned units left the battlefield this turn (destroyed or otherwise removed). REWARD: 5 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control more objective markers than your opponent. REWARD: 5 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control your opponent's home objective marker. REWARD: 8 VP.

Punishment.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Destroyer's Wrath.summary: Purge vs Priority Assets — kill units and out-hold the enemy.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more enemy units were destroyed this turn. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control more objective markers than your opponent. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: More enemy units than friendly units were destroyed since the end of your opponent's last turn. REWARD: 5 VP.

Destroyer's Wrath.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Consecrate.summary: Purge vs Reconnaissance — kill to consecrate objectives.

blocks.label: MECHANIC
blocks.text: Each time a unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, it becomes a Consecration unit. At the end of your turn, each Consecration unit within range of an objective marker (not your home, not already Consecrated) may Consecrate it and cease being a Consecration unit.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: 1–2 objectives are Consecrated by you (3 VP total, not per objective). REWARD: 3 VP. OR 3+ objectives are Consecrated by you (6 VP total). REWARD: 6 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control more objective markers than your opponent. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: Your opponent's home objective is Consecrated. REWARD: 5 VP.

Consecrate.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Immovable Object.summary: Take and Hold vs Purge — centre control and expansion holding.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control one or more Centre objective markers. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUNDS 2–4
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: For each objective marker you control outside your deployment zone. REWARD: 5 VP each.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUND 5
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn (if you are going second). REQUIREMENT: For each objective marker you control outside your deployment zone. REWARD: 5 VP each.

Immovable Object.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Battlefield Dominance.summary: Take and Hold mirror — dominate the objective count.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUNDS 1–2
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control more objective markers than your opponent. REWARD: 2 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per home objective you control while you control your home objective. REWARD: 3 VP per objective.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per non-home objective you control while you control your home objective. REWARD: 5 VP per objective.

Battlefield Dominance.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Determined Acquisition.summary: Take and Hold vs Disruption — cap uncontested objectives.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control an objective you did not control at the start of your turn (not your home). REWARD: 2 VP per such objective.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per objective you control outside opponent deployment zone. REWARD: 3 VP per objective.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per objective you control in opponent deployment zone. REWARD: 6 VP per objective.

Determined Acquisition.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Inescapable Dominion.summary: Take and Hold vs Priority Assets — wide board control.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control 3+ objective markers. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control 2+ objectives. REWARD: 5 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control more objective markers than your opponent. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control opponent's home objective. REWARD: 5 VP.

Inescapable Dominion.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Purge and Secure.summary: Take and Hold vs Reconnaissance — kill on objectives and hold.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You destroyed an enemy unit while within range of an objective, OR destroyed an enemy unit on an objective. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per non-home objective you control. REWARD: 4 VP each.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control more objectives than at the start of your turn. REWARD: 3 VP.

Purge and Secure.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Delaying Action.summary: Disruption vs Purge — attrition and central/expansion control.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per enemy unit destroyed this turn. REWARD: 2 VP each.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control a Centre objective and an Expansion objective. REWARD: 3 VP.

Delaying Action.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Death Trap.summary: Disruption vs Take and Hold — booby-trap terrain and objectives.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per terrain area trapped this turn (not an objective). REWARD: 2 VP each.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per trap placed on an objective marker this turn. REWARD: 5 VP each.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more enemy units that started the turn in a trapped area were destroyed. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

actions: BOOBY TRAP (ACTION): Starts in your Shooting phase. One unit within range of a non-home objective or eligible terrain area in No Man's Land. Completes immediately. Place a trap marker.
Death Trap.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Outmaneuver.summary: Disruption mirror — seize the enemy deployment zone.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control your opponent's home objective. REWARD: 10 VP.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUND 1
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per non-home objective you control. REWARD: 4 VP each.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUNDS 2–3
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: Per non-home objective you control. REWARD: 5 VP each.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUND 4+
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per non-home objective you control. REWARD: 6 VP each.

Outmaneuver.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Locate and Deny.summary: Disruption vs Priority Assets — sensor sweeps and relic control.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: One or more enemy units that started the turn within range of an objective were destroyed. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Only one Operation marker remains and you control it uncontested. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control the sole remaining marker with no enemies in range. REWARD: 5 VP.

actions: SENSOR SWEEP (ACTION): One unit within range of a Centre objective. Completes end of turn if you control it. Remove an enemy Operation marker (if more than one remains).
Locate and Deny.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per objective decoyed this turn (not in opponent deployment zone). REWARD: 2 VP each.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per objective decoyed in opponent deployment zone this turn. REWARD: 4 VP each.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: 4+ objectives are decoyed. REWARD: 10 VP.

actions: DECOY (ACTION): Unlimited uses on non-home objectives you control; completes end of turn. Decoy markers removed if an enemy ends a move within range.
Smoke and Mirrors.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

Vital Link.summary: Priority Assets vs Purge — stack Operation markers on Centre objectives.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control one or more Centre objectives. REWARD: 2 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per Operation marker on Centre objectives you control. REWARD: 1 VP per marker.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control a Centre objective. REWARD: +4 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control opponent's home objective. REWARD: 10 VP.

actions: VITAL LINK (ACTION): Once per turn on a Centre objective. Completes end of turn if you control it. Place an Operation marker.
Vital Link.cap: Max 45 VP per game · 15 VP per battle round

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You completed Secure Asset on an objective this turn. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You destroyed an enemy unit within range of a Centre objective. REWARD: 2 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control 3+ objectives. REWARD: 4 VP.

actions: SECURE ASSET (ACTION): On a non-home objective you control; completes end of turn.

Extract Relic.summary: Priority Assets vs Disruption — sensor sweep the relic.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You completed a Sensor Sweep. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Enemy unit that started the turn on an objective was destroyed. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per objective sabotaged this turn (not in opponent deployment zone). REWARD: 3 VP each.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per objective sabotaged in opponent deployment zone this turn. REWARD: 5 VP each.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

actions: SABOTAGE (ACTION): On a non-home objective; completes when performed.

Vanguard Operation.summary: Priority Assets vs Reconnaissance — vanguard operations in terrain.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You completed a Vanguard Operation. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You destroyed an enemy unit. REWARD: 2 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

actions: VANGUARD OPERATION (ACTION): On terrain with no enemies within range; completes end of turn if still uncontested.

Triangulation.summary: Recon vs Purge — triangulate objectives for big end-of-turn scores.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: 1 objective Triangulated: 3 VP; 2: 6 VP; 3+: 10 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: You control 4+ objectives. REWARD: 10 VP.

actions: TRIANGULATION (ACTION): From battle round 2, once per turn on a non-home objective you control; completes end of turn. Place a Triangulation marker.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Units in 3 table corners (6"+ from centre). REWARD: 3 VP. OR REQUIREMENT: Units in all 4 table corners (6"+ from centre). REWARD: 6 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Per enemy unit destroyed. REWARD: 1 VP each.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You surveilled an enemy not near a marked objective. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control more objectives than opponent. REWARD: 4 VP.

actions: SURVEIL (ACTION): Target an enemy within 18"; completes immediately.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control a Centre objective. REWARD: 3 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: Enemy that started the turn in terrain was destroyed. REWARD: 2 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP per objective.

Gather Intel.summary: Recon mirror — extract intel from objectives.

blocks.label: BATTLE ROUND 1
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You control a Centre objective. REWARD: 6 VP.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the Command phase (or the end of your turn if it is the fifth battle round and you are going second). REQUIREMENT: You control one or more objective markers that are not within your deployment zone. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. REQUIREMENT: You extracted intel on an objective. REWARD: 6 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE
blocks.text: WHEN: End of the battle. REQUIREMENT: Intel extracted on 3+ objectives. REWARD: 5 VP.

blocks.label: END OF BATTLE

Assassination.summary: Eliminate enemy Characters with extreme prejudice.

blocks.label: FIXED
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy CHARACTER is destroyed: 4 VP (Wounds 4+) or 3 VP (Wounds less than 4).

blocks.label: TACTICAL
blocks.text: WHEN: End of either player's turn. One or more enemy CHARACTER models destroyed: 5 VP. OR all enemy CHARACTERS destroyed during the battle: 5 VP.

Assassination.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

blocks.label: FIXED
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE is destroyed: 2 VP (+2 VP cumulative if total Wounds 15+; +2 VP more if 20+).

blocks.label: TACTICAL
blocks.text: WHEN: End of either player's turn. One or more enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE units destroyed this turn. REWARD: 4 VP.

Bring it Down.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Bring it Down.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If no enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE units are on the battlefield, you may discard and redraw.

blocks.label: FIXED
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy INFANTRY unit with Starting Strength 13+ (including Attached) is destroyed. REWARD: 5 VP.

blocks.label: TACTICAL
blocks.text: WHEN: End of either player's turn. One or more such units destroyed this turn. REWARD: 5 VP.

A Grievous Blow.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
A Grievous Blow.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If no eligible enemy INFANTRY units are on the battlefield, you may discard and redraw.

Engage on All Fronts.summary: Establish a presence in multiple table quarters.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. Presence in 2 quarters: 1 VP. OR 3 quarters: 2 VP. OR 4 quarters: 4 VP.

Engage on All Fronts.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Engage on All Fronts.whenDrawn: When Drawn: A unit wholly in a table quarter more than 6" from the battlefield centre counts as presence in that quarter.

Engage on all Fronts.summary: Establish a presence in multiple table quarters.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. Presence in 2 quarters: 1 VP. OR 3 quarters: 2 VP. OR 4 quarters: 4 VP.

Engage on all Fronts.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Engage on all Fronts.whenDrawn: When Drawn: A unit wholly in a table quarter more than 6" from the battlefield centre counts as presence in that quarter.

Behind Enemy Lines.summary: Break through and cut off enemy escape routes.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. One unit (not AIRCRAFT, not Battle-shocked) wholly in opponent deployment zone: 3 VP. OR two or more such units: 4 VP.

Behind Enemy Lines.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Behind Enemy Lines.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If battle round 1, you may shuffle this card back into your deck and draw a new card.

Secure No Man's Land.summary: Seize objectives in No Man's Land.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. You control one objective in No Man's Land: 2 VP. OR two or more: 5 VP.

Secure No Man's Land.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

No Prisoners.summary: Show no mercy — destroy enemy units.

blocks.label: FIXED
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy Bodyguard or non-CHARACTER unit is destroyed. REWARD: 2 VP each (up to 5 VP per battle round).

blocks.label: TACTICAL
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed. REWARD: 2 VP each (up to 5 VP per battle round).

No Prisoners.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

blocks.label: CLEANSE (ACTION)
blocks.text: STARTS: Shooting phase. UNITS: One or more within range of a non-home objective. COMPLETES: End of your turn if you still control it. IF COMPLETED: That objective marker is cleansed by your army.

blocks.label: FIXED
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. One objective marker cleansed by your army this turn. REWARD: 2 VP. OR two or more objective markers cleansed. REWARD: 4 VP.

blocks.label: TACTICAL
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. One objective marker cleansed by your army this turn. REWARD: 3 VP. OR two or more objective markers cleansed. REWARD: 5 VP.

Cleanse.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Cleanse.whenDrawn: When Drawn: Select objectives to cleanse as per card.

Defend Stronghold.summary: Defend objectives in your deployment zone.

blocks.label: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
blocks.text: WHEN: End of opponent's turn or end of battle. You control one or more objectives in your deployment zone. REWARD: 3 VP.

Defend Stronghold.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Defend Stronghold.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If battle round 1, shuffle back and draw a new card.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: While this card is active. Each time an enemy unit that started the turn within range of an objective marker is destroyed. REWARD: 3 VP each (up to 5 VP per battle round). Leader and Bodyguard count separately if Attached.

Overwhelming Force.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. More of your units than opponent's wholly within No Man's Land. REWARD: 4 VP.

Display of Might.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Display of Might.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If battle round 1, shuffle back and draw a new card.

Outflank.summary: Hold both flanks of the battlefield.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. You have units wholly within both the left and right halves of the battlefield (see card). REWARD: 5 VP.

Outflank.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

Forward Position.summary: Hold the enemy home or every Expansion objective.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. You control your opponent's home objective marker. REWARD: 5 VP. OR you control each Expansion objective marker. REWARD: 5 VP.

Forward Position.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

Burden of Thrust.summary: Guard nominated objectives with assigned units.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. Each nominated objective is controlled by its guardian unit. REWARD: 2 VP per objective (up to 5 VP per battle round).

Burden of Thrust.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Burden of Thrust.whenDrawn: When Drawn: Select objectives and guardian units as described on the card.

Centre Ground.summary: Deny the centre of the battlefield.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. One or more units wholly within 3" of the battlefield centre and no enemy within 3": 2 VP. OR no enemy within 6": 5 VP.

Centre Ground.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round

Beacon.summary: Keep your Beacon unit alive behind enemy lines.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your opponent's turn. Your Beacon unit is not destroyed and is wholly outside your deployment zone. REWARD: 5 VP.

Beacon.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Beacon.whenDrawn: When Drawn: Select a Beacon unit on the battlefield or embarked in a TRANSPORT.

blocks.label: PLUNDER (ACTION)
blocks.text: Perform on a terrain feature (see card).

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of your turn. You completed Plunder on a terrain feature. REWARD: 5 VP.

Plunder.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
Plunder.whenDrawn: When Drawn: If you already have Cleanse, you may discard and redraw (and vice versa).

A Tempting Target.summary: Seize the bait objective in No Man's Land.

blocks.label: ANY BATTLE ROUND
blocks.text: WHEN: End of either player's turn. You control your Tempting Target objective marker. REWARD: 5 VP.

A Tempting Target.cap: Max 45 VP (Tactical) or 20 VP per card (Fixed) · 15 VP per battle round
A Tempting Target.whenDrawn: When Drawn: Opponent selects one No Man's Land objective (not a home objective) as your Tempting Target.
